calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Maria A. Yuen, Esq., specially appearing for Petitioners: Li Yang, as guardian ad litem for Minor: Yunyang Fang, and minor's father Ze Xu Fang, both present, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the Petition for Change of Name of Minor to: Percy Yunyang Fang.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Off Calendar
